root.string: ACKS ascending AC starts at 0 (unarmored) and goes up. Roll 1d20 + mods; hit if total >= Base + target AC. From 2E descending AC: ACKS AC = 10 - 2E AC (so 2E AC 10 = ACKS AC 0).
ACKS II Attack Throw (the N in N+). To hit: roll 1d20 + modifiers >= Base + target AC, where AC is ACKS ascending (unarmored = 0). From 2E descending AC: ACKS AC = 10 - 2E AC.
Class advancement THACO is ignored while 2E Attack Throw is active. Attack throws come from the ACKS II class/HD progressions (Fighter, Crusader/Thief, Mage).
ACKS II Attack Throw from Hit Dice (Monster HD column). Edit to set a manual throw; change HD to recompute from the table.
ACKS ascending Armor Class (0 = unarmored, higher is better). Need to hit = Attack Throw + AC. 2E descending AC is stored underneath (ACKS AC = 10 - 2E AC).
